results.title: Top firms could add $400m to charities with just a small fraction of profits, charity boss
results.description: Australia’s biggest businesses are being urged to close a glaring generosity gap, with households currently shouldering the bulk of donations to charity.

results.title: Take-Two Reconfirms GTA 6 Release Date in an SEC Filing
results.description: Take Two reaffirmed the official Grand Theft Auto 6 release date in an SEC proxy statement tied to an $8 billion revenue forecast...
